board.race_name: LEAD HEAD, BEERS & BACON BROS MAIDEN

ref.race_name: LEAD HEAD, BEERS & BACON BROS MAIDEN

R:RCC:1:2026-07-23.comment: 1. WARRIOR BOY ran on late behind a runaway winner here last out when finishing runner-up. He is knocking on the door, and will carry 3kg less this time thanks to a claim. He is meeting a very modest lineup, and gets his best chance to break through for an overdue win. 4. PRIVATE TREATY is another who is well overdue for her first win, and her recent form is very good for a race like this. Our only query would be the jump up from 1400m to 2200m, but she is still a top 3 hope. 5. FRIENDOFTHEDEVIL ran on late over 1600m here last start when settling back from a wide gate early on. She is likely to settle a lot closer to the pace this time, and she is expected to be right in the finish this time. 6. AVIVA was very disappointing over this trip last start, but she is better than that, and can make amends in this sort of field. 3. SAINT is having his second start from a new stable, and he is not the worst top 4 chance at odds.

runners.name: OVERHEATED
runners.comment: Last start 4th of 11 at this track on July 8 over 2200m, 17 len behind Baggio carrying 58.5kg at $38.70. The race before that raced behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 12 at Riccarton Park on June 16 over 1600m, slow going 12 len behind Out Of The Picture with 58.5kg at $20.80. In the mix.

runners.name: SAINT
runners.comment: Third-up today. First-up sat behind the speed prior to fading 9th of 12 at Phar Lap Racecourse on June 7 over 1600m, in the wet; 8 len behind Cambalache with 56.5kg at $11.70. Second run from a spell 8th of 11 at this track on July 8 over 2200m, 21 len behind Baggio carrying 56.5kg at $21.60. Finds a suitable race and is worth including.

runners.name: LIQUID BLUE
runners.comment: Comes off a 37 day let-up. Most recently 7th of 12 at Riccarton Park on June 16 over 1600m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Out Of The Picture with 55.5kg at $21.60. The race before that got back early 7th of 13 at Wingatui on May 31 over 1300m, on a wet track; 6 len behind Aspen Voltage with 55.5kg at $25.90. Looking to others.

runners.name: PRIVATE TREATY
runners.comment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 4th of 8 at this track on July 8 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Russian Blues with 56.5kg at $4.60. The run before that 3rd of 10 at this track on June 25 over 1400m, 2 len behind Gadabout with 57.5kg at $14.30. Can improve on the latest effort and gets her chance.

runners.name: WARRIOR BOY
runners.comment: Recent form sound. At the latest run came from midfield; 2nd of 11 at this track on July 8 over 2200m, 11 len behind Baggio carrying 58.5kg at $4.20. The race before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 13 at this track on June 25 over 1600m, 1.3 len behind Fah Rong with 55.5kg at $9.10. Sure to be tough to beat.

runners.name: FRIENDOFTHEDEVIL

Before that 5th of 12 at Riccarton Park on June 16 over 1600m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Out Of The Picture with 56.5kg at $7.40. Finds a nice race this time and is likely to feature.

runners.name: AVIVA

Before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 9 at Phar Lap Racecourse on June 7 over 2200m, on rain affected going; 1.5 len behind Sunningdale carrying 53.5kg at $8.50. runners.name: SHE'S GIFTED

ref.race_name: LEAD HEAD, BEERS & BACON BROS MAIDEN

R:RCC:1:2026-07-23.comment: 1. WARRIOR BOY ran on late behind a runaway winner here last out when finishing runner-up. He is knocking on the door, and will carry 3kg less this time thanks to a claim. He is meeting a very modest lineup, and gets his best chance to break through for an overdue win. 4. PRIVATE TREATY is another who is well overdue for her first win, and her recent form is very good for a race like this. Our only query would be the jump up from 1400m to 2200m, but she is still a top 3 hope. 5. FRIENDOFTHEDEVIL ran on late over 1600m here last start when settling back from a wide gate early on. She is likely to settle a lot closer to the pace this time, and she is expected to be right in the finish this time. 6. AVIVA was very disappointing over this trip last start, but she is better than that, and can make amends in this sort of field. 3. SAINT is having his second start from a new stable, and he is not the worst top 4 chance at odds.
